description_long: This object is a rectangular fax machine with a predominantly light gray plastic body and a dark translucent blue cover over the paper feed area. The front panel features a series of tactile buttons, labeled controls, and indicator lights, with the brand 'OKIDATA MICROLINE 320 Turbo' clearly visible. The top section includes a sloped, semi-transparent cover that likely protects the paper feed mechanism, and a rear paper tray with raised guides for holding sheets. On the right side, there is a prominent cylindrical knob or roller, possibly for manual paper adjustment, and a power switch. The back of the machine is mostly flat with a vented or textured panel, and the overall design is boxy with slightly rounded edges. No telephone handset or numeric keypad is visible, and the output slot is located at the front beneath the control panel.
description: A boxy, light gray fax machine with a dark blue translucent cover, front control panel, and rear paper tray. The front features tactile buttons and indicator lights, while the right side has a cylindrical knob and power switch.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the rectangular body, the sloped translucent blue cover, and the rear paper tray extending outward.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the control panel with buttons, indicator lights, and branding, as well as the output slot beneath the panel.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the cylindrical knob or roller, the power switch, and the edge of the translucent cover.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a flat, vented or textured panel and the back of the paper tray, with no visible controls or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face, featuring a horizontal row of tactile buttons and labeled controls, with indicator lights above some buttons. The panel is grouped with the brand label on the right and a power button on the left. No display screen or numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the rear, extending outward and slightly upward, with raised guides to hold and align paper. It appears to have a moderate capacity and is partially covered by the translucent blue lid.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front center, directly beneath the control panel, with a small tray or guide to catch emerging paper.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is present or visibly attached to the object.
